title: narcissus tazetta var. mediterraneus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. mediterraneus, also known as the miniature daffodil or Mediterranean winter aconite, is a species of flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as a natural anti-inflammatory agent, due to its content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. mediterraneus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of depression and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
